summary: Comprehensive testing of Yasmin Lemke multi-language luxury advisory website completed successfully. Tested language switcher (EN/ES/PT), translations, navigation, contact form integration, and responsive design across desktop/tablet/mobile viewports.

issues: Minor timing issue with mobile language switcher animation - PT language option click timeout

English translation verification: 'Enterprise Risk. Executive Careers.'
Navigation links working across all pages (Companies, Careers, About, Contact)

Contact form submission with success message display
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8), Frontend Desktop: 100% (10/10), Frontend Mobile: 89% (8/9), Frontend Tablet: 100% (10/10), Overall: 97% (36/37)
